questions.q: According to a recent 18-year longitudinal study, what generally happens to a person's tendency to procrastinate as they move through young adulthood?
options: It tends to decline
It increases significantly
It completely disappears
It remains entirely unchanged

questions.q: Using a microscopic model of human nerves and muscles, scientists recently discovered that the physical symptoms of Alzheimer's disease can begin in what area?
options: Outside the brain in peripheral nerves
In the spinal cord fluid only
Within the cardiac muscle
Exclusively in the liver
questions.correctText: Outside the brain in peripheral nerves

questions.q: A new PNAS study investigating romantic partner preferences found that a woman's traditional desire for a wealthier partner diminishes under what specific circumstance?
options: When women gain more economic power
When societal birth rates decline
When they move to a rural environment
When men display higher emotional intelligence
questions.correctText: When women gain more economic power

questions.q: In a recent test using the Atacama Cosmology Telescope to observe how galaxy clusters move toward one another, what did researchers conclude about gravity on cosmic scales?
options: It behaves as expected, strengthening the case for dark matter
It behaves unpredictably, disproving the existence of dark matter
It accelerates over distance, suggesting a new fundamental force
It reverses its effect across hundreds of millions of light-years
questions.correctText: It behaves as expected, strengthening the case for dark matter

questions.q: Researchers recently developed a new analytical method and discovered that small fish living downstream of urban wastewater treatment plants are actively accumulating what substances?
options: Antidepressants, opioids, and other drugs of abuse
High levels of microplastics from clothing
Agricultural pesticides and fertilizers exclusively
Heavy metals from industrial runoff
questions.correctText: Antidepressants, opioids, and other drugs of abuse
